title: I Tried the Open Source ElevenLabs Alternative (Voicebox)
summary: Voicebox is a free, open-source local AI voice studio for developers offering voice cloning, text-to-speech, dictation, agent voice output, and a REST API. The video demonstrates it as a privacy-focused, local-first alternative to cloud services like ElevenLabs with unlimited generation capabilities.
writeup: The video tests Voicebox, a free, open-source local AI voice studio aimed at developers, and frames it as a local-first alternative to cloud services such as ElevenLabs. It walks through the core features: voice cloning, text-to-speech, dictation, agent voice output, and a REST API, all running locally with unlimited generation. The emphasis is on privacy and local inference, since processing happens on the developer's own machine rather than a cloud endpoint, and the coverage notes MCP integration for connecting the tool into agent workflows.
